data.title: Sharp to Showcase Its Most Comprehensive Production Print Portfolio Yet at PRINTING United Expo 2026
data.description: At Booth N6960, attendees will have the exclusive opportunity to preview the latest advancements in production print technology, an increased network of partners, and Sharp's comprehensive line of digital production presses. The event will take place in Montvale, New Jersey, starting on July 23, 2026. This announcement comes from Sharp Imaging and Information Company of America (SIICA), which is a division of Sharp.

data.title: Ondo Finance's Oasis Pro Markets Secures FINRA Authorizations to Offer Broad Range of Tokenized Equities and Funds to U.S. Investors
data.description: Ondo Finance has received new authorizations from FINRA to introduce regulated markets and services for tokenized securities in the United States. This initiative will be overseen by the SEC and FINRA. The announcement was made in New York on July 23, 2026. Ondo's SEC-registered broker-dealer subsidiary is set to launch these services, marking a significant advancement in the sector.

data.title: PREQUEL APPOINTS BEAUTY INDUSTRY LEADERS NATHALIE KRISTO AS CEO AND TORAL PATEL AS CMO TO ACCELERATE NEXT PHASE OF GROWTH
data.description: Dr. Samantha Ellis, the founder of Prequel Skin, has put together an executive leadership team to expand the brand, one of the fastest-growing dermatologist-developed skincare lines in the United States. This announcement was made on July 23, 2026, in Los Angeles. Prequel Skin, created by board-certified dermatologist Dr. Ellis, has garnered significant success in the skincare industry.

data.title: Percent's Private Credit Infrastructure Enables Trillium Technologies to Launch Compute Credit Investment Marketplace
data.description: Percent is facilitating the creation of private credit products through its institutional-grade infrastructure. This infrastructure handles deal structuring, investor onboarding, compliance framework, and marketplace mechanics. Launched in New York on July 23, 2026, Percent is at the forefront of modernizing private credit markets. Their efforts aim to bring these products to market efficiently and effectively.

data.title: Theodore Roosevelt Presidential Library Announces Leadership Transition Following Landmark Opening; Founding CEO Edward F. O'Keefe Named President & CEO of The WNET Group
data.description: On July 23, 2026, in Medora, North Dakota, the board of trustees of the Theodore Roosevelt Presidential Library revealed that O'Keefe, the institution's original CEO, has been appointed as the President & CEO of The WNET Group. This decision comes after the successful grand opening on July 4, which marked a historic moment for the presidential library. The transition highlights the significant progress and growth following the opening event, indicating a bright future for both institutions.

data.title: Pearl Meyer Welcomes Chief People Officer Emily Daughters
data.description: In an effort to enhance its people strategy, Pearl Meyer has appointed daughters to spearhead the firm's initiatives while emphasizing growth, collaboration, and a high-performance culture. The company's move is part of ongoing investments in these areas. This development was announced on July 23, 2026, in Boston. Pearl Meyer is an executive compensation consulting and leadership advisory firm under the Coalesce Capital portfolio.

data.title: Indivior to Report Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Host Webcast
data.description: Indivior Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: INDV) disclosed that it is set to unveil its financial outcomes for the second quarter of 2026 on Tuesday, August 4, 2026, at 7:00 a.m. U.S. Eastern Daylight Time. The Chief Executive Officer, Joe Ciaffoni, along with executives from the leadership team, will conduct a live webcast presentation at 8:00 a.m. U.S. EDT subsequent to the financial disclosure.

data.title: Middlefield Healthcare Dividend ETF Distributions
data.description: Toronto, July 23, 2026 - The Middlefield Healthcare Dividend ETF (TSX: MHCD) is set to distribute dividends for the third quarter of 2026 to its unitholders. The dividends will be payable to holders of Middlefield Healthcare Dividend ETF units.

US 10Y Note Yield officially surges above 4.70% for the first time since January 2025. This puts yields above the "Liberation Day" high in April 2025, set to drive interest rates to new 52-week highs.

data.title: Ford to integrate Apple Maps into new self-driving system for electric vehicles, potentially setting trend for industry.
data.description: For the first time, Ford Motor will integrate Apple software into its new line of electric vehicles, impacting their operations. This move could set a trend for other automakers to adopt similar technology partnerships.

data.title: Middlefield ActivEnergy Dividend Class ETF Series Distributions
data.description: In Toronto on July 23, 2026, the Middlefield ActivEnergy Dividend Class ETF Series (TSX: MAEC) shared news that distributions for Q3 of 2026 will be paid out to unitholders. The Fund expressed its satisfaction in declaring these payments to investors.

data.title: Middlefield Innovation Dividend ETF Distributions
data.description: In Toronto on July 23, 2026, the Middlefield Innovation Dividend ETF (CBOE: MINN) stated that it will distribute its third-quarter payments for 2026. The distributions will be made to the unitholders of Middlefield Innovation Dividend ETF in the upcoming period.

data.title: Middlefield Real Estate Dividend ETF Distributions
data.description: On July 23, 2026, the Middlefield Real Estate Dividend ETF (TSX: MREL) disclosed its distribution details for the third quarter of the same year. Unitholders of the Middlefield Real Estate Dividend ETF can anticipate receiving payments accordingly.

US Secretary of State Marco Rubio has warned the International Criminal Court of ‘consequences’ if it attempts to prosecute American political or military officials. Rubio said the court had no jurisdiction over US citizens because Washington is not a member.

data.title: Balance Named to CNBC’s World’s Top Fintech Companies List for a Second Consecutive Year
data.description: Balance, a financial infrastructure for physical B2B trade based in New York, has secured a spot on CNBC's World's Top Fintech Companies list in the Payments category for the second consecutive year. This comes after a phase of significant expansion for Balance, as it grows its presence in the enterprise sector. The list, a collaboration between CNBC and Statista, evaluates over 2,000 fintech companies to determine the top performers. Balance's recognition underscores its success amidst a competitive landscape.

data.title: TestMu AI Introduces the Source-to-Verdict Loop in Kane CLI, Carrying Every Requirement to a Ship Decision With Portable Proof
data.description: A company based in San Francisco and Noida, India, announced that TestMu AI (formerly LambdaTest), known as the world's first Agentic AI-powered Quality Engineering platform, has unveiled a new feature in Kane CLI, its natural-language testing tool. This feature, called the source-to-verdict loop, represents a significant advancement for Kane CLI which initially started as a browser automation tool. The loop in Kane CLI now guides a product requirement through to a decision on whether to ship, by automatically generating tests, executing them in a local browser environment, gathering evidence, assessing test coverage based on actual outcomes, and ultimately providing a verdict. This innovation streamlines the testing process and enhances decision-making when it comes to product deployment.
